texto: If you are always right, something is not right of you. If you always want to be right, still something is wrong with you. Wisdom and knowledge, growth and maturity, prosperity and success - these things don't always come from the right things, in fact, they never come in the right things but always at the right time. Never refuse to grow, learn and mature, its your time and its the right time.
